MdTestData.MdString:
> One line
> two lines > two lines
> three lines > three lines > three lines
> four lines > four lines > four lines
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
One line

two lines

two lines

three lines

three lines

three lines

four lines

four lines

four lines
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> One line
> two lines > two lines
> three lines > three lines > three lines
> four lines > four lines > four lines

MdTestData.MdString: > This is a blockquote - List item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: > This is a blockquote - List item

MdTestData.MdString:
> line > > line
> line > > line > > > line
> line > > line > > > line > > > > line
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> line > > line
> line > > line > > > line
> line > > line > > > line > > > > line

MdTestData.MdString:
> line > > line
> line > > line > > > line > > line > line
> line > > line > > > line > > > > line > > > line > > line > line
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> line > > line
> line > > line > > > line > > line > line
> line > > line > > > line > > > > line > > > line > > line > line

MdTestData.MdString:
> Level 1 > > Level 2 > Back to Level 1 > > > Level 3
> Line 1 >> Line 2 >>> Line 3 > Line 4
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> Level 1 > > Level 2 > Back to Level 1 > > > Level 3
> Line 1 >> Line 2 >>> Line 3 > Line 4

MdTestData.MdString:
> Something > > >[!note] Title > > > Body
> Something >>>[!note] Title >>> Body
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
Something

Title

Body

Something

Title

Body
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> Something > > >[!note] Title > > > Body
> Something >>>[!note] Title >>> Body

MdTestData.MdString: > This is a blockquote with escaped characters: \*, \>, `\``

ParagraphMdSyntaxNode.TextMdSyntaxNode: This is a blockquote with escaped characters:

MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified: This is a blockquote with escaped characters: *, >, `
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: > This is a blockquote with escaped characters: \*, \>, `\``

MdTestData.MdString:
>
This is a div inside a blockquote.

BlockQuoteMdSyntaxNode.HtmlMdSyntaxNode: This is a div inside a blockquote.

MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified: This is a div inside a blockquote.
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
>
This is a div inside a blockquote.

MdTestData.MdString:
> Mixed levels and lists: > 1. First > > Nested blockquote with text. > 2. Second > - Sub-item > > Another nested quote.
> - First item > - Nested item with **bold text**. > - Second item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
Mixed levels and lists:

  1. First

    Nested blockquote with text.

  2. Second
    • Sub-item

      Another nested quote.

  • First item
    • Nested item with bold text.
  • Second item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> Mixed levels and lists: > 1. First > > Nested blockquote with text. > 2. Second > - Sub-item > > Another nested quote.
> - First item > - Nested item with **bold text**. > - Second item

MdTestData.MdString:
> This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*.
> Inline formatting: > **Bold**, *italic*, `code`, and [link](https://example.com).
> **Bold text**, *italic text*, `inline code`, ~~strikethrough~~, and [link](https://example.com).
> This is a paragraph. > ``` > Code block inside a blockquote. > ```
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
This is a blockquote with bold text and italic text.

Inline formatting:

Bold, italic, code, and link.

Bold text, italic text, inline code, strikethrough, and link.

This is a paragraph.

Code block inside a blockquote.
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString:
> This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*.
> Inline formatting: > **Bold**, *italic*, `code`, and [link](https://example.com).
> **Bold text**, *italic text*, `inline code`, ~~strikethrough~~, and [link](https://example.com).
> This is a paragraph. > ``` > Code block inside a blockquote. > ```

MdTestData.MdString: > This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*. > 1. First item > 2. Second item > - Sub-item
MdTestData.ExpectedHtmlStringSimplified:
This is a blockquote with bold text and italic text.

  1. First item
  2. Second item
    • Sub-item
MdTestData.ExpectedMarkdownString: > This is a blockquote with **bold text** and *italic text*. > 1. First item > 2. Second item > - Sub-item
